title: pterocarpus cambodianus var. oblongus
intro: Pterocarpus cambodianus var. oblongus is a variety of the Cambodian Pterocarpus tree, native to Southeast Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pterocarpus cambodianus var. oblongus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are made by boiling the bark or roots in water to release its active compounds and are used to treat various health conditions.
